Song: Half-Decade Hangover by Will Wood

Lyrics: I was drunk when I made my bed/ Now with a half-decade hangover I lay down in it/ What have I done? Don't know what I've said/ It's a half-decade hangover, either this, in jail or dead/ It's a half-decade hangover, Jesus Christ, my aching head.
